changes.description: Group tags appear on dashboard raid badges.
changes.details: MeowConnect group assignments are mirrored into the local userlogs database so dashboard raid badges can show the assigned group tag, such as WIPE or SWINE, instead of the default Static label.

Assigning a static-marked character to a MeowConnect group now applies to the full raid instead of one specific difficulty filter, so the group marker remains visible across Normal, Hard, Nightmare, and unfiltered views.
The MeowConnect realtime listener now also watches group, group member, and group raid assignment tables so group changes can refresh while the app is open.
MeowConnect group tags are now reserved globally across groups so short dashboard badges stay unambiguous for every user.

MeowConnect now writes focused debug logs for initial loads, manual syncs, debounced realtime refreshes, local group tag mirroring, and header pending-request checks so Supabase request spikes are easier to trace without flooding the log for every realtime row event.

changes.description: Pending request refreshes are less chatty.
changes.details: The app header now only receives a MeowConnect pending-request update when the pending count actually changes, and the regular header poll uses a pending-only lookup instead of loading full friends, groups, members, and assignments.

Roster uploads now upsert current MeowConnect characters before deleting only stale character IDs, preventing Supabase cascade deletes from wiping group raid assignments for characters that still exist.

changes.description: Static reservations stay visible after legacy cleanup.
changes.details: The Supabase reservation read policy now follows accepted friend and shared group visibility instead of the removed legacy static-friend marker, so expanded MeowConnect profiles can still show Reserved or group labels for static-marked raids.

changes.description: Reserved characters no longer look group-assigned.
changes.details: MeowConnect now uses the green shared-static character frame only when a reserved character is actually assigned to a shared group. Plain static reservations remain visible as Reserved without being counted or styled as available group characters.

changes.description: Discord remember-me no longer trusts a raw ID file.
changes.details: App access now relies on the persisted Supabase Discord OAuth session instead of the legacy editable meowgang_auth.txt Discord ID cache. Old auth text files are removed on launch, and whitelist display-name checks no longer write local auth state.

changes.description: Legacy Party Planner browser storage is cleaned up.
changes.details: Startup now removes stale WebView localStorage and sessionStorage entries related to the old Google Apps Script Party Planner flow so obsolete script URLs no longer remain visible in DevTools.

changes.description: Idle MeowConnect header polling is slower.
changes.details: The app header now checks pending MeowConnect requests every three minutes while idle instead of every minute, while local raid completion and MeowConnect setting changes still trigger an immediate lightweight refresh.
